title: Tehran compound of Khamenei son and likely successor bombed, report says
summary_full: It is not clear whether Khamenei, who was rumoured to be the top choice to succeed his father, was killed in the strike
summary_public: It is not clear whether Khamenei, who was rumoured to be the top choice to succeed his father, was killed in the strike
